title: cortex.audit.<scope>.<verb>.v1 data payload (generic)
description: Stub schema for the shared audit envelope wrapped by every cortex.audit.* CloudEvent. Field surface is TBD-strict — subject + timestamp are the only required keys so CORTEX_REQUIRE_ENVELOPE=1 has a target to validate against. Tighten before enforcing strict mode in production. Per-scope schemas (cortex-audit-agentgateway, -graph, -sandbox) inherit this shape.
